name: cashsnap_two_stage_real_synth_p24_trueempty_proposal_gate_browser_stack

evidence.summary: Real+synth p24 is the best current detector-AP mechanism candidate, but not a product promotion. On full real test, gate-only exact-value is 1199 versus balanced real p24 gate-only 1209, and background-FP images are 88 versus 79. On strict clean excluding khmer_us_currency, synth+real gate/reclassifier rows look better, but khmer_us_currency churn reverses the source-level result.

known_limits: Diagnostic mechanism candidate only; it fails the original balanced-real product guard on full real background-FP images and exact value.
The current evidence says source/class cleanup, especially khmer_us_currency and KHR_100 routing, must precede promotion.
Current 13-class schema cannot encode KHR_100 or other out-of-scope banknotes.
Use reject>=0.99 as the safe operating point from current evidence.
The old denomination reclassifier lowers exact-value for this detector too; keep this as detector plus gate unless a better reclassifier is proven.
